title: hieracium australe subsp. mediolanense
intro: Hieracium australe subsp. mediolanense, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of Italy. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium australe subsp. mediolanense include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant's aerial parts are used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
